stalenessPolicy: Re-verify against control/docs/PROGRAM_MANAGER_OUTPUT_CONTRACT.md before any Program Manager completion/status contract claim; operational backlog/status remains UNKNOWN unless a separate approved truth source is provided.

blockers.blocker: Operational backlog/status population requires a separate approved current-state truth source.
blockers.resolution: Provide a non-secret current project source containing milestones, tasks, owners, dependencies, blockers, and verification evidence.
